CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2005 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2005 Continued To Nov-01-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Petition To Approve Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment - Minor
Off Calendar Jul-28-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Trina Ayala.
Michon M. Herrin, Esq., for Petitioner: Dorothy Toney, present as Guardian at litem for: Damien Toney, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney Fees: $7,368.50
Medical Expenses $4,321.83
Fees & Expenses: $12,216.34
A net balance of $17,783.66 to be deposited into a blocked account with San Francisco Fire Credit Union, 320l California Street, San Francisco, CA 94118, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-28-2005 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment - Minor
Off Calendar Jul-28-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Trina Ayala.
Michon M. Herrin, Esq., for Petitioner: Dorothy Toney, present as Guardian at litem for: Dasia Toney, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney Fees: $7,368.15
Medical Expenses $8,556.88
Fees & Expenses: $16,452.55
A net balance of $13,547.55 to be deposited into a blocked account with San Francisco Fire Credit Union, 320l California Street, San Francisco, CA 94118, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
